hero.title: What’s new on RunGoMX
hero.description: This page shares practical updates to public event pages, help content, results, rankings, and other changes visitors may notice.

updates.title: Useful updates, not filler
updates.description: These notes focus on changes that affect the public site and the people using it.

registrations.title: Event pages now do a better job of guiding registration
registrations.summary: RunGoMX puts more weight on public event pages so visitors can see where registration, payment context, and official event information live before they sign up.

points.point1: The public event directory is the main place to start browsing races.
points.point2: Event pages remain the best place to check whether registration is open and what details are already published.
points.point3: Official results and rankings stay easy to reach as their own proof surfaces.

help.title: Help is clearer about what you can solve on your own
help.summary: The help center now does a better job of pointing visitors to self-serve answers first and making it clear when support is actually needed.

points.point1: Help content stays focused on registrations, event details, results, rankings, and account access.
points.point2: Contact is still the right path for issues tied to a real event, registration, or account.
points.point3: The goal is faster answers, not more content for the sake of content.

trust.title: Trust pages stay focused on useful information
trust.summary: Privacy, terms, official results, and rankings are treated as practical references people can actually use.

points.point1: Official results remain one of the clearest public proof points on the site.
points.point2: Rankings keep their link to published result data visible.
points.point3: Support and policy pages are written to answer real questions, not pad the site.

relatedLinks.title: See the parts of the site these updates affect
relatedLinks.description: Every update here should point back to a real public page in the product.

events.title: Events
events.description: Browse live public event listings and continue into event pages.

results.title: Official results
results.description: Verify published event outcomes through the results page.

help.title: Help center
help.description: Start with self-serve guidance before opening a support request.

contact.title: Contact RunGoMX
contact.description: Reach the team when your question depends on a real event, result, or account.
